channel.title: StreamElements on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in StreamElements on Tech Tracker

item.title: StreamElements - best app to livestream on YouTube and Twitch for free.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-FDrNiNBI4a8/YgP0NA2_d5I/AAAAAAAAJF0/dqwy9Q8SCwo4bnLcm-G-mZJnWObc1V7ygCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1644426288696191-0.png" alt=""> Do you stream games like fortnite or pubg on YouTube or Twitch? If yes you require a streaming platform which provide features that are essential for successful streaming session for instanse OBS is a PC software used by streamers to stream games etc, while on smartphones apps like Streamlabs and Turnip apps are popular choices. Even though, YouTube and Twitch has it’s own default live stream option but still you can’t add overlays on it even customize or add advanced settings is not possible, so due to lack of features streamers depend on third party software and apps like OBS, Turnip etc to do live streams and increase engagement with thier followers.
